{# contact_timeline.html — Activity timeline for a vendor contact. Receives: contact (VendorContact), activities (list[ActivityLog]), vendor_id (int). Called by: htmx_views.py contact_timeline route. Depends on: Tailwind CSS with brand palette, activity_row macro. #} {% from "htmx/partials/shared/_macros.html" import activity_row %}

Timeline — {{ contact.full_name or contact.email or 'Contact' }}

{% if activities %}
{% for a in activities %} {{ activity_row(a) }} {% endfor %}
{% else %}

No activity recorded for this contact.

{% endif %}
